heading: Events
subtitle: Join us for transformative learning experiences and community gatherings

upcoming.title: Events 2026

upcoming.title: Ramadan Portal 2026
upcoming.description: Your comprehensive companion for the blessed month of Ramadan. Access daily Quran reflections, special lectures, Dawrah-e-Quran sessions, and spiritual resources.

past.title: Saudi Arabia Ilm & Umrah Trip 2024
past.description: A blessed journey combining sacred Umrah with immersive Islamic learning in the holy lands. Students experienced firsthand the places of revelation and prophetic history.

past.title: Pakistan Trip December 2024
past.description: An enriching educational trip to Pakistan featuring community engagement, onsite classes, and fellowship with students across our local branches.
